<> to replace one url with another in a string in php you can use the str_replace function which replaces all occurrences of a search string with a replacement string here is an example of how to do this ```php $string = 'new post on the site http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1

'; $old_url = 'http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1'; $new_url = 'http://yahoo.com/abc1'; $result = str_replace($old_url, $new_url, $string); echo $result; ``` this will replace all instances of the old url with the new url in the given string a palindrome is a word phrase or sequence that reads the same backward as forward for example the word "madam" or the phrase "a man a plan a canal panama" is a palindrome the palindrome in this response is "madam"
